bead.title: agent: add downgrade-loop regression coverage
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The downgrade-loop failure needs an end-to-end regression guard. Unit tests for individual helpers are not enough; a future change could still reintroduce an auto-downgrade across two ddx work/watch passes after operator promotion.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:1037-1041 documents that terminal non-actionable readiness outcomes unclaim and park so the bead does not reappear in ReadyExecution until operator review.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:1207-1226 implements that park path. Without a full loop test, a promoted open bead can be parked again by the same readiness result.
- cli/cmd/agent_run_passthrough_test.go and cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop*_test.go contain readiness/proposed assertions today, but no test proves proposed -> open operator acceptance survives repeated worker passes for the same finding while hard manual-required cases remain parked.

PROPOSED FIX
Add regression coverage that exercises the real loop shape:
- Create or seed an open bead.
- Simulate/readiness-return a parkable finding and assert first pass parks to proposed with evidence.
- Promote proposed -> open through the supported bead lifecycle path.
- Run at least two additional worker/readiness passes with the same finding and assert the bead does not re-enter proposed.
- Run a separate hard manual-required scenario that must still park to proposed, so continuous-forward-progress does not become agent guessing.

NON-SCOPE
- No new production policy beyond what ddx-91898f19, ddx-cd69c24, and ddx-78ab5d61 implement.
- No live Fizeau or external model calls; use existing test runner/hook stubs.
- No changes to unrelated post-land review tests except updating expected event bodies if needed.

PARENT/DEPS
Parent: ddx-cc0641a7. Depends on ddx-91898f19, ddx-cd69c24, and ddx-78ab5d61.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add TestWorkLoopOperatorPromotedOpenDoesNotDowngradeAgain: first readiness pass parks an open bead to proposed, supported lifecycle promotion moves it back to open, and two later loop passes with the same finding leave it non-proposed.
2. Add TestWorkLoopOperatorOverridePreservesCommitmentText asserting title, description, acceptance criteria, labels, parent, and deps are not lost or silently rewritten while honoring the override.
3. Add TestWorkLoopHardManualRequiredStillParks asserting contradictory/unsafe operator_required readiness still parks to proposed even after the WARN-ONLY changes.
4. The regression uses the same execute loop/readiness hook path as ddx work, not only a pure helper.
5. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... -run "TestWorkLoop(OperatorPromotedOpenDoesNotDowngradeAgain|OperatorOverridePreservesCommitmentText|HardManualRequiredStillParks)"` passes.
6. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/...` passes.
7. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"too_large: The bead bundles multiple separable behaviors: the repeated-pass downgrade regression after operator promotion, a hard manual-required parking case, and prompt/metadata preservation. Existing coverage already exercises the operator-required parking path in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_preclaim_serial_test.go`, and the shared parking helper is at `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:2907`, so the only clearly missing behavior is the repeated-pass regression. That makes the current bead non-atomic and better split into a focused regression bead plus any adjacent coverage bead(s).","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"All eight rubric criteria pass: the title is imperative and scoped, the description includes PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE with file:line evidence plus PROPOSED FIX and NON-SCOPE, the acceptance criteria are numbered and verifiable with named Test* symbols and go test filters, the loop-path assertions are wired to the described behavior, the required go test and lefthook commands are present, the labels cover phase/area/kind/cross-reference facets, and parent/deps are explicit. The bead is a sufficient sub-agent prompt without waivers.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}
